title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> Alternate Endings – Some students wil
content:
✔ Alternate Endings – Some students will unlock alternative paths to their final challenge based on their past actions.

Example: Hidden Literary Figure – “The Stranger in the Shadows”

✔ If a student correctly identifies a hidden reference to Camus’ The Stranger before the class discussion, they gain the “Philosopher’s Cloak”, which grants them one-time immunity from a failed Skill Check.

✅ Why This Works:
• Encourages deep engagement & literary curiosity.
• Gives students incentive to read closely and make connections.
• Creates a sense of mystery and discovery in the course.

📌 Final Lock-In Questions for Version 5.8

1. Should boss fights be recorded and saved as class “legends” for future semesters?

✔ Example: If a student creates an exceptionally strong argument in a boss challenge, their response is archived for future students to try to beat.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 227 (chunk 227/555)
